Record Class BenchmarkResult

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.graphite.result.BenchmarkResult
public record BenchmarkResult(String name, int warmup, int iterations, double totalNanos, double averageMillis, double minimumMillis, double maximumMillis, double standardDeviation, double operationsPerSecond) extends Record
Represents the outcome of a benchmark execution.

A BenchmarkResult stores execution statistics collected during repeated benchmark iterations.

Contents

  • Average execution time
  • Minimum execution time
  • Maximum execution time
  • Iteration count
Since:
2.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay
See Also:
  • Benchmark
  • BenchmarkRunner

  • Constructor Details

    • BenchmarkResult

      public BenchmarkResult(String name, int warmup, int iterations, double totalNanos, double averageMillis, double minimumMillis, double maximumMillis, double standardDeviation, double operationsPerSecond)
      Creates an instance of a BenchmarkResult record class.
      Parameters:
      name - the value for the name record component
      warmup - the value for the warmup record component
      iterations - the value for the iterations record component
      totalNanos - the value for the totalNanos record component
      averageMillis - the value for the averageMillis record component
      minimumMillis - the value for the minimumMillis record component
      maximumMillis - the value for the maximumMillis record component
      standardDeviation - the value for the standardDeviation record component
      operationsPerSecond - the value for the operationsPerSecond record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      public String name()
      Returns the value of the name record component.
